stemHtml:
The captain decided to load an extra 120 kg of fuel before the take-off:

Take-off fuel: 910 Kg
Trip fuel: 730 Kg
Zero Fuel Weight (ZFW): 3230 kg
Maximum Landing Weight (MLW): 3500 kg
Maximum Take-off Weight (MTOW): 4290 kg

options.a: Proceed to a hold to lose 30 kg to be able to complete the landing.
options.b: The take-off is NOT possible under this condition.
options.c: No need to hold, there's no operational impact.
options.d: Proceed to a hold to lose 120 kg to be able to complete the landing.
